items.title: No piped water supply for four days in Model Town
items.ai_explanation: Reports have tripled in two weeks and cluster tightly around one failed pumping station, suggesting a single fixable cause behind most of the complaints.

detail.recommended_action: Inspect the Model Town pumping station; residents report the outage began after a reported equipment failure.

items.title: Extended power cuts near Ambala school zone
items.ai_explanation: A sparking transformer near a school raises the safety stakes well above a typical outage complaint, warranting faster-than-usual attention.

detail.recommended_action: Prioritise the transformer inspection given its proximity to a school and reports of visible sparking.

items.title: Open drain flooding lanes near Kurukshetra temple
items.ai_explanation: Recurring flooding after every rainfall points to a structural blockage rather than a one-off event, and mosquito-related health complaints are rising alongside it.

detail.recommended_action: Schedule a drain-clearing crew before the next forecasted rainfall to prevent repeat flooding.

items.title: Deteriorating market road causing accidents
items.ai_explanation: Two reported accidents in a month elevate this from routine road maintenance to a safety issue that's likely to keep escalating if left unaddressed.

detail.recommended_action: Fill the reported potholes and consider temporary signage until repaving can be scheduled.

items.title: Voltage fluctuations damaging appliances in Rohtak
items.ai_explanation: Appliance damage and billing errors reported together suggest a metering or transformer fault rather than isolated complaints.

detail.recommended_action: Send a technician to audit the local transformer and cross-check recent meter readings.

items.title: Growing sinkhole on Panipat highway connector
items.ai_explanation: The absence of any barricading around a growing sinkhole on a truck route makes this more urgent than its report count alone would suggest.

detail.recommended_action: Place temporary barricades immediately and fast-track a structural assessment.

items.title: Uncollected garbage overflowing in Ambala lanes
items.ai_explanation: A week-long gap in collection has let waste accumulate to the point of attracting stray animals, a level residents haven't reported before.

detail.recommended_action: Re-route the collection truck to cover the missed lane this week.

items.title: Discoloured borewell water reported in Sonipat
items.ai_explanation: Reports of discolouration and odour together are consistent with contamination rather than a cosmetic issue, so this merits a water quality test.

detail.recommended_action: Commission a water quality test at the affected borewell before advising residents further.

items.title: Dark stretch near Karnal bus stand raises safety concerns
items.ai_explanation: Reports specifically mention women avoiding the route after dark, which raises the social cost of this repair above a typical lighting complaint.

detail.recommended_action: Replace the two leaning lamp posts and restore the darkened stretch as a single job.

items.title: No segregated waste collection in Hisar block
items.ai_explanation: This reflects a policy gap rather than an acute failure, so it can likely be scheduled alongside routine service planning.

detail.recommended_action: Add the block to the next segregated-collection rollout phase.
